title: Fate and Tsukihime OST Music Pack
description: Replaces Minecraft's in-game music with various TYPE-MOON soundtracks.
body:
Pack made with sirmephistopheles6666's template.

***As of now, this pack does not change music discs. This is prone to change in the next update.

____________________________________________________________________________________

Soundtracks included:

Fate/Stay Night (Game - 2004)

Fate/Hollow Ataraxia (Game - 2005)

Fate/Stay Night (Anime - 2006)

Sound Drama Fate/Zero (Drama CD - 2008)

Tsukihime (Game - 2000) [OG, Tsuki-Bako, Ever After]

Kagetsu Tohya (Game - 2001)

Garden of Avalon - glorious, after image (Drama CD - 2016)
